title: Intune App Assignments
description: Intune Win32 app group assignments. Located at windows/intune/assignments.json in each title repo.

groupId.description: Entra ID (Azure AD) group object ID to target.

filterId.description: Intune assignment filter ID. Required when filterMode is 'include' or 'exclude'.

notifications.description: Toast notification behavior for this assignment.

deliveryOptimizationPriority.description: Delivery optimization priority for content download.
